In high school, he belonged to the kyudo club. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kinoko  Komori
description: Kinoko Komori is a student in Class 1-B, and is training to be a Pro Hero. Her quirk, Mushroom, allows her to spread spores that sprout mushrooms wherever they land, including inside of people's bodies.

name: Kung Fu Dugong
description: __First Appearance:__ Chapter 161; Episode 96 The Kung-Fu Dugongs are a type of Dugong living in Arabasta that is famous for their martial arts skills and strength. Their code of honor states that once they are defeated, a Dugong must become the follower of the one who defeated them. Their code extends to any 'disciples' their master may have with him as well. Currently, their master is Luffy as he unwittingly defeated them all. They live in the Sandora River. (Source: One Piece Wikia)

name: Leen
description: As head of the Fairy Tribe of Mismede, Leen serves as the court mage of the Kingdom of Mismede and is capable of using her personal null magic, 'Program'. Over the span of 200 years, she has used 'Program' to create an automated teddy bear named Paula who can to interact with humans, though it has yet to gain the capability to speak.
